textPlain: The "editing" showdown is very good. Introduced me to the Seedream model which i didn't know about until now.I don't fully understand the iterative methodology tho - they allow multiple attempts, which are judged by another multimodal llm? Won't they have limited accuracy in itself?
I had to upvote immediately once I got to Alexander the Great on a Hippity Hop

What about the classic:
A analog watch that shows the time 08:15?Did current models overcome the 10:10 bias?
The horse chimera is much better
